steps.title: Identify the initial amount
steps.content: At the start of the observation, there are $38{,}000$ yeast cells. This is the coefficient in the exponential model.

steps.title: Use the doubling factor
steps.content: Doubling every hour means the count is multiplied by $2$ for each hour. After $t$ hours, the model is $$ y=38{,}000(2)^t $$ The answer is D.
